title: More Than Biomes!
description: Ever wanted to have more features to plain boring old vanilla? Well now you can! This mod adds new biomes and new ores and each with their own armor and weapon sets. New mobs for the new biomes, and so much more!
body:
In this Mod you will be amazed by the new biomes and its stunning views and more. Plus the ores you will find will shock you so musch because they are very good for tools. Also each biome has its own custom wood and leaf type. By the way, if this mod is posted on a site that is not Modrinth or Curseforge, then it is a virus. If you put this mod on a different site then the link should go to the modrinth site. Thank you! Ok, so part of the next update is adding about 6 new biomes, and a dimension, with its own unique ores! Also gonna fix some bugs! Stay Tuned!! It is optional if you want to use more than ores![Jadesplosion before](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6cc51393a8650c8c36022fff4c6c37b151f9d48a.png) ![Jadesplosion after!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/41421379fc2fea0f9f091fcac4580cae34f4934e.png)


You may use this mod in your modpacks
